title: Geoscripting with Python - Automation of Geographic Analyses

weeks.building: Hörsaal, Im Neuenheimer Feld 348, Ground floor

further_info: IMPORTANT: The full course program on “Geoscripting - Automation of Geographic Analyses” consists of a 1) lecture and the aligned 2) lab course for hands-on exercises. You need to register for both lecture and lab course separately.
